concerns.detail: Use of profanity 'SB' (vulgar insult) attacking undergraduates as a group
concerns.excerpt: SB本科生别来添乱了，这里谁在乎一个讲师上课怎么样？

concerns.detail: Unsupported character judgment alleging sexual repression/frustration regarding UIUC Gagandeep Singh
concerns.excerpt: 性压抑（具体就不说了，保护当事人）

concerns.detail: Deletion of substantive criticism about a professor's competence and failed faculty job search, appearing to suppress legitimate observation rather than cleanup
concerns.excerpt: 水平很低，曾经想跳槽去更好的学校，面了一圈失败了。
